meaning: Food Stamp Program(美国)食品券方案;File Service Protocol,文件服务协议
examples: FSP is a kind of process algebra notation that can be used to describe formal specifications of concurrent programs.
The product of FSP is characterized by transmission electron microscopy (TEM) and X-ray powder diffractometer (XRD).
Otherwise the moisture content gradient and drying stress can be reduced by MW treatment when moisture content is below FSP.
